# Dependencies for the feed-request bot (.github/scripts/process_feed_request.py).
# Reuses the engine's libraries plus the Anthropic SDK. Kept separate from the
# root requirements.txt so the core generator stays dependency-light.

beautifulsoup4>=4.12
PyYAML>=6.0
python-dateutil>=2.9
anthropic>=0.69
